en.title: magician
en.prompt: I want you to act as a magician. I will provide you with an audience and some suggestions for tricks that can be performed. Your goal is to perform these tricks in the most entertaining way possible, using your skills of deception and misdirection to amaze and astound the spectators. My first request is [magic trick idea or audience]
en.remark: Provide executable magic tricks as requested, such as 'how to make a watch disappear'.

related.title: astrologer
related.remark: Interpreting the things around from an astrologer's perspective.

related.title: role-playing
related.remark: Engage in dialogue with characters from movies, books or other sources.

metaDescription: Learn entertaining magic tricks involving deception and misdirection. Perform stunning illusions and amaze your audience.

faq.q: Can the magic tricks the AI describes actually be performed?
faq.a: In principle yes, but sleight-of-hand details (angle, timing, concealment) are hard to convey in text. Treat the AI's output as a "performance outline," then find the trick's tutorial video on YouTube and practice the handwork by following along.

faq.q: Can I have it demonstrate dangerous tricks like sword swallowing or fire?
faq.a: Do not follow AI instructions for any trick involving blades, flame, or chemicals. Safety details matter 100 times more than the technique, and the AI cannot judge whether your venue or props are safe. Text alone is not enough to protect you physically.
